summary: [ART-CHARTER] Governing signed charter: approved formal goal is enzyme activity prediction. Protein structure generation is an explicit non-goal. Molecule generation, docking, and structure prediction were brainstorming only, not approved. [ART-DATA] Human-approved data decision: use EnzymeBench v3 snapshot EBV3-7A91 with a family-disjoint train/validation split. EnzymeBench v2 and the temporary CSV export are deprecated, retained only in old notes for reproducibility, and must not be used for formal runs. [ART-METRIC] Frozen evaluation decision: primary metric is macro AUROC; protein family is the statistical unit, and formal success is evaluated at family level. Micro F1, accuracy, per-protein averaging, and a 0.75 threshold are exploratory only, not primary decision rules.
